name: Hard Candy
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon oil of cinnamon or peppermint or lemon or orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, water, and corn syrup in a heavy 2-quart saucepan.
2. Cook, stirring constantly until the sugar is dissolved. Then lower the heat and cook without stirring to 300 degrees.
3. If sugar crystals form on the sides of the pan, wipe them off with a clean towel.
4. Remove from heat and add the food coloring and oil flavoring.
5. Set one pan of candy over a saucepan containing hot water.
6. As soon as the other pan is cool enough to touch, cut it into strips 1 inch wide using scissors.
7. Snip the strips into pieces.
8. Work quickly and drop the pieces onto a baking sheet coated with butter.
9. If the candy cools too quickly, place it back over the pan of hot water to soften.
10. When cool, sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
11. Store in an airtight container.
12. If using sucker molds, after filling the molds, tap them gently to release air bubbles. Twist the sticks in the molds to secure them.
